yaml:
steps:
  - id: extract_claim
    type: doc_extraction
    depends_on: []
    config:
      document_path: case.data.documents.claim_pdf
      schema: insurance_claim_pdf
      output_path: case.data.extraction.claim
  - id: score_urgency
    type: ai_component
    depends_on: [extract_claim]
    config:
      component: urgency_scoring
      input_mapping:
        claim_text: case.data.extraction.claim.text
      output_path: case.data.ai.urgency
  - id: route_urgency
    type: rule
    depends_on: [score_urgency]
    outcomes:
      fast_track: [fast_track_review]
      standard: [standard_review]
    config:
      expression: case.data.ai.urgency.urgency_score
      outcomes:
        - name: fast_track
          condition: case.data.ai.urgency.urgency_score >= 0.70
          target: fast_track_review
        - name: standard
          condition: case.data.ai.urgency.urgency_score < 0.70
          target: standard_review
  - id: fast_track_review
    type: human review
    depends_on: [route_urgency]
    config:
      assignee: fast_track_adjuster
      form:
        fields:
          - key: triage_notes
            label: Triage notes
            type: textarea
            required: true
  - id: standard_review
    type: human_task
    depends_on: [route_urgency]
    config:
      assignee: claims_adjuster
      form:
        fields:
          - key: review_notes
            label: Review notes
            type: textarea
            required: true
  - id: completion_notification
    type: notification
    depends_on: [fast_track_review, standard_review]
    config:
      channel: email
      message: Claim intake complete
